title: JHY DESIGN 3 Colors Bedside Rechargeable Table Lamp Translucent Ceramics Dimmable LED Touch Lamp for Living Room Bedroom Cafe Outdoors Kids Room (Diamond Pattern)
features: 【Cordless Portable Design】This table lamp doubles as a USB-C chargeable bedside light, and you can charge it on any USB devices for ongoing illumination.Portable wireless design eliminates unsightly wires and can act as an emergency light during power outages.Moderate weight and size, can be picked up and placed elsewhere at any time. You can place it on your desktop, bookshelf, entryway, bedside and anywhere else you need it.

【Touch Control&3 Color Stepless Dimmable】This product features a convenient touch switch that allows you to easily toggle between different lighting modes: white light, warm white light, and warm light. With a long press, you can adjust the brightness from 10% to 100%, giving you full control over the lighting intensity to suit your needs. Whether you need a gentle, soft glow for relaxing or sleeping, or a brighter light for dining, reading, or decoration, this lamp offers flexibility for any setting.

【Widely Used】This lamp is designed to be cordless and can be powered by USB, giving you the freedom to use it anywhere.Portable design table lamp is suitable for bedroom, living room, study, coffee table, office and outdoor, etc., can be used as center decoration. Perfect for your friends or family who likes warm lighting and interesting home or office decor. Makes an ideal housewarming, Father's Day, Mother's Day, birthday, or anytime present.

【Production Technology】The lamp body is made of ceramic, which is thick and durable. Patterns of different shapes are engraved on the lamp body, providing uniform color and frosted texture, adding matte, rustic charm to any space.
【Devoted Customer Service】This product comes with lifetime customer service - If you found any problem of our products,contact us,we will response you in 24 hours.
description: Product Description JHY DESIGN Ceramic Spherical Decorative lamp 15cm H Rechargeable Table Lamp Portable Decorative Cordless Table Lamp Material: Ceramic Size: 13cm D × 15cm H Color: White Pattern: Diamond pattern This lamp with emits warm light, bright but not extremely bright, doesn't hurt the eyes, will add a nice accent to most any room. Also can be a great gift,perfect for your friends or family who likes retro lighting and interesting home or office decor. Makes an ideal housewarming, Father's Day, Mother's Day, Birthday,or anytime present. Touch Conyrol & Stepless Dimming Light This LED cordless desk lamp features a new upgraded touch switch. There's no need to plug it in, simply touch the top to easily control the light. The lamp is stepless dimmable—just hold the touch to adjust the brightness from 10% to 100%. It remembers your last setting, so it returns to your preferred brightness when switched back on. Party or Home Decoration Not only ideal for home decoration,but also a good choice for a party decoration. a nice light as our beautiful decorative lamp is a necessary. USB port(USB-C cable included) This lamp can be charged by USB-C cable from many types of equipment such as wall outlets, laptops, or powerbanks. Light up the darkness Bring the light to where you are going,make a sense of safety with warm light. Note When not used for a long time, the battery will enter into a sleep state, and needs to be recharged several times to stimulate the battery activity. It should be placed in a place with normal temperature, low temperature will affect the performance of the battery and reduce the capacity and service life.
